claim_boundary: OPEN_TRAIN-only computational contact intermediates derived from independent dual-receptor HADDOCK poses. They are not binding, affinity, competition, experimental blocking, Docking Gold, or final submission evidence.

pose_policy.pose_rank_key: ascending finite HADDOCK score, then model filename
pose_policy.failed_seed_policy: never impute a failed seed; require at least two observed successful seeds

aggregation.job_pair_frequency: rank-weighted mean of binary residue-pair contact indicators
aggregation.candidate_receptor_pair_frequency_primar: median job_pair_frequency over successful seeds, with absent pairs represented as zero within observed successful seeds
aggregation.candidate_receptor_pair_frequency_auxili: mean and standard deviation over successful seeds

leakage_boundary.allowed_use: teacher intermediates for a sequence/label-free-monomer-to-contact proxy trained inside each whole-parent training fold
leakage_boundary.forbidden_use: concatenate true held-out docking contacts with held-out structure features
leakage_boundary.held_out_contact_label_access: evaluation only after held-out predictions are fixed

observed_before_freeze.note: One successful job and one pose were inspected only to verify file/schema/chain feasibility before freezing this bulk-extraction contract.
